reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXdDdtc0dREAE

reviews.comment:
Amabilidad de los empleados ,cuentan con dormis ,muy comodos limpitos confortables ,ventilados ,con A A y tele ,incluye el desayuno ahi en la Ypf (mejoraria la rapidez en la atencion u organización al desayunar ...pero es el interior ..creo viven mas tranquilos y mejor )
Llegamos de noche y pudimos cenar en el Shop de la Ypf
Precio para dormir 4 excelente ,no den vueltas ,ni busquen x el pueblito ODA

(Translated by Google)
The staff were friendly, and the dormitories were very comfortable, clean, and well-ventilated, with air conditioning and a TV. Breakfast is included at the YPF gas station (the service and organization could be improved... but it's in the countryside... I think they live more peacefully and better there). We arrived at night and were able to have dinner at the YPF shop. The price for sleeping four was excellent; don't bother looking around or searching in the town.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXeDhuVUpBEAE

reviews.comment:
Baños muy muy sucios. Imposible entrartículo.  Bar mal atendido y servilletas tiradas sucias en el piso de afuera. Muy desagradable todo

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were filthy. It was impossible to enter the building. The bar staff was poorly served, and dirty napkins were lying on the ground outside. The whole experience was very unpleasant.

reviews.comment:
Baños super sucios . y los playeros con pocas ganas de trabajar muy lentos había colas de autos de mas de 10 . y ellos atendian sin ganas ..

(Translated by Google)
Super dirty restrooms. The beach attendants were very slow and had little desire to work. There were lines of cars over 10 long, and they were reluctant to serve.
